# Mint — 00_AGENT_START

Read first:
- AGENTS.md
- rules.md
- SOT.md
- tools/openapi/mint.openapi.canonical.json
- visions/vision_features.md
- PRIVACY.md

Then:
1) Restate the task in 1 sentence.
2) Plan (6–12 steps) with exact file paths.
3) Acceptance criteria (bullets).
4) Tests to add/update.
5) Commands to run (lint/analyze/tests).
6) If bugfix: add test.

Constraints:
- No heavy deps without ADR.
- No payment/transfer.
- No sensitive logs.
